content_body:
“We have a lot of motorcyclists that come through, especially during the spring and summer,” one cyclist said. “It’s the ride of your life. You can take in beautiful waterfalls, foliage, breathtaking mountain views and meet some friendly folks along way.”

Blood Mountain is the sixth-highest peak in Georgia and boasts breathtaking panoramic views of the Blue Ridge Mountains, making it a super thrilling ride.

Unlike similar roads in the North GA Mountains, Blood Mountain has two lanes allowing motorcycles to navigate their way through slower traffic which is a huge plus in experiencing this scenic drive.

More leisurely traffic have their own lane without holding up motorcyclists from seeking their thrills on the many S-curves. Reserve one of our motorcycle friendly cabin rentals and start planning your next getaway!
title: Blood Mountain Scenic Drive
